description: Plaud ingest workflow was not launched at boot on April 20. Boot sequence executed but background Agent for plaud-ingest was never fired. Working memory entry recorded 'full boot sequence executed' without noting the omission.
correction: Plaud ingest must be launched as a background Agent during Phase 2 of every boot, no exceptions. This is the third recorded instance of this failure (see err-20260326-003, err-20260327-001).
systemic_fix: Pattern is recurring. Consider adding explicit plaud-launched checkpoint to boot working memory write so the omission is self-evident on review.
